description: This Java class, NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor, is part of the Spring Boot configuration pipeline. It ensures that the 'spring.datasource.url' property is set from the environment variable 'DATABASE_URL' when the latter is a JDBC URL. The class performs checks to avoid override if the property is already set or if 'DATABASE_URL' does not start with 'jdbc:'. It also specifies the order of execution in the environment post-processing chain.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor
classes.description: A Spring Boot EnvironmentPostProcessor that sets the JDBC datasource URL based on the DATABASE_URL environment variable, ensuring it starts with 'jdbc:' and not overriding existing configurations.

methods.name: postProcessEnvironment
methods.description: Checks if DATABASE_URL is set and is a JDBC URL, then sets 'spring.datasource.url' property accordingly if not already set.

methods.name: getOrder
methods.description: Returns the order precedence for this post-processor, ensuring it runs early in the environment processing chain.
